runHistory.summary: Implemented haptic feedback coordination for widget interactions. Created HapticManager singleton with CoreHaptics support and UIKit fallback. Widget sets 'widgetHapticPending' flag in UserDefaults when mood is logged. Main app detects this flag on scenePhase .active transition and triggers success haptic feedback. Supports both rich CoreHaptics patterns and standard UINotificationFeedbackGenerator.

scenariosVerified: All Swift files parse without errors
Xcode project generates successfully with HapticManager
evidence: HapticManager.swift created with CoreHaptics and UIKit support
WidgetHapticModifier detects scenePhase changes
LogMoodIntent marks widgetHapticPending in UserDefaults
MoodFlicker2App monitors scenePhase for .active transitions
All Swift syntax validation passed
notes: WidgetKit limitation: App Intents cannot directly trigger haptics
Solution uses UserDefaults flag + main app scenePhase detection
Haptic only triggers if flag is set within last 5 seconds
Supports CoreHaptics on capable devices, UIKit fallback on others
HapticManager provides multiple feedback types: light/medium/heavy impact, success/error/warning, selection
Widget success haptic uses custom CoreHaptics pattern when available
All pending widget haptics are cleared after processing
MF-001 story now complete with both TASK-003 and FIX-TASK-003-01 done

Implemented MoodRepository with full CRUD operations, date range queries, and count operations. Updated AppContainer to inject MoodRepository and configured MoodFlicker2App with SwiftData modelContainer.

runHistory.summary: Created WidgetKit extension with interactive widget displaying 5 emoji buttons (😔 😟 😐 🙂 😄). Implemented LogMoodIntent App Intent for handling mood selection from widget. Added timeline provider with 15-minute refresh policy for relative time display. Configured app group sharing between app and widget for SwiftData persistence. Updated project.yml with widget target, entitlements, and framework dependencies.

runHistory.summary: Implemented 7-day trend chart using Swift Charts. Created TrendViewModel for calculating daily mood averages, TrendChartView with bar chart visualization showing mood values over time with emoji annotations, tap interaction to show exact date and average value, and mood color scheme (blue-gray to coral gradient). Chart displays on Today tab above entries list, handles sparse data gracefully with placeholder bars, and shows friendly empty state when insufficient data.

runHistory.summary: Implemented CSV export functionality in Settings. Created CSVExportService with batch processing for memory efficiency, SettingsViewModel for state management, and SettingsView with export UI. CSV includes columns: Date, Time, Mood (1-5), Mood Emoji, Tag with UTF-8 BOM for Excel compatibility. Added Settings tab to RootView with export button, entry count display, and iOS share sheet integration.

runHistory.summary: REMEDIATION: Implemented widget checkmark confirmation (0.5s) feature. Added showingConfirmation flag and confirmationMoodValue to MoodEntryTimelineEntry. Updated LogMoodIntent to set confirmation state before saving mood entry and schedule widget refresh to clear confirmation after 0.5s. Created ConfirmationView with large emoji, green circle background, 'Logged!' text, and 'Mood saved successfully' subtitle. Timeline provider checks confirmation timestamp and automatically transitions back to normal state.
